data.content: Implementation review approved. Verified src/components/settings-agents-scanned.tsx adds a custom cmdk filter that performs case-insensitive substring matching across option ids and provider/model keywords, satisfying the required partial-match behavior and clearing behavior. Verified unit coverage in src/components/__tests__/settings-agents-scanned.test.ts for value matches, keyword matches, no-match behavior, and cleared-search visibility. Sanity gates passed in the implementation worktree: bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and bun run build.
